title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard present an AI Research OS that converts 10,000+ notes from Obsidian vaults into live context for AI agents through three-layer memory architecture: raw content, indexed layer, and wiki layer. The system is designed to enable personalized deep research across personal knowledge bases and the open web while remaining token-efficient.
writeup: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard demonstrate an AI Research OS that turns more than 10,000 Obsidian notes into live context for AI agents. The architecture has three memory layers: raw content, an indexed layer, and a wiki layer. The talk covers how this design supports personalized deep research across a personal knowledge base and the open web while staying token-efficient.
